ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Insolation Energy Limited has announced the resignation of Ms. Pallavi Mishra, an Independent Director and chair of both the Nomination & Remuneration and Corporate Social Responsibility Committees, effective June 30, 2026. The stated reason for her departure is "professional commitments elsewhere," with Ms. Mishra explicitly confirming no other material reasons, thereby mitigating immediate red flags concerning internal disputes or governance issues. This necessitates the company to promptly appoint a new independent director to ensure continued board independence and effective functioning of these key committees.
